opportunities.title: SOMA AI-Enabled Foundational Learning — 4-Year Programme Grant
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Full DD Q&A (4 sets from June 16) submitted June 30 by Youdi + Michael, with SOMA CN attached. Lorcan replied July 1 confirming progression. Second limited set of questions expected second half July 2026. Decision expected Q1-Q2 2027. NOTE: SOMA redesigned July 2026 by LI board — assessments + ability grouping + learning dashboard + Mwalimu Kinara + AI analytics. No TaRL prescription, no WhatsApp bot. May need to brief Lorcan on redesign if second DD round asks about programme model.

opportunities.title: KiuFunza Phase 5 — VTF Renewal 2026-2027
opportunities.won_lost_notes: LearnImpact signed and returned agreement July 9 2026. Vodacom counter-signature expected within 2-3 weeks (~July 30). Agreement circulating to VTF internal stakeholders. Onboarding into Vodacom systems pending receipt of fully signed agreement.

opportunities.title: KiuFunza Phase 5 — Hempel Foundation Renewal (Hearing Committee)
opportunities.won_lost_notes: USD 587K confirmed FY2026. Renewal under active Hearing Committee consideration. Renewal formally LOW probability (extension already given 2026). HF Board TZ visit Sept 27+30 is critical cultivation — prepare actively. Rosa mentioned renewal possibility at Oxford April 2026. Anders Holm (HF Director) engaged for first time at SC May 27.

opportunities.title: Dovetail / Prevail Fund — Track 1 (KiuFunza Assessment)
opportunities.won_lost_notes: USD 100K grant agreement SIGNED July 2026. Track 1 scope: KiuFunza assessment technology. Ali Ellegard (Dovetail) is the relationship holder. Track 2 (SOMA) conversation to be initiated after Track 1 onboarding.

opportunities.title: Dovetail / Prevail Fund — Track 2 (SOMA Learning Dashboard + AI Analytics)
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Track 2 conversation NOT YET STARTED. Ali Ellegard is the contact. SOMA redesigned July 2026: pitch angle is now AI predictive analytics (KiuFunza + Uwezo data) + live learning progress dashboard. Stronger fit for Dovetail than WhatsApp coaching. Initiate after Track 1 onboarding complete.

opportunities.title: VTF — SOMA Learning Dashboard + AI Analytics (Technology Mandate Fit)
opportunities.won_lost_notes: SOMA conversation with VTF NOT YET STARTED. Must begin after VTF counter-signature (~July 30). SOMA redesigned July 2026: pitch angle is live learning dashboard + AI predictive analytics — strong fit for VTF 80% tech mandate. Frame as natural tech extension of KiuFunza partnership, not a separate ask.

opportunities.title: GPE Tanzania — SOMA as complementary NGO delivery mechanism
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Tanzania received $88M GPE grant 2026. Entry: position SOMA as NGO complement to GPE-funded government programme. Requires PMO-RALG door-opener.

opportunities.title: Microsoft AI for Accessibility — Timamu Assistive Technology Grant
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Rolling applications. Most accessible high-alignment grant for Timamu. Apply as soon as legal registration complete.

opportunities.title: Adobe Foundation — Digital Creativity for PWDs
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Rolling. Smaller grant ($25-75K) but excellent fit and accessible. Could be first anchor for Timamu.

opportunities.title: Google for Nonprofits — Ad Grant ($10K/month search credits)
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Non-cash: $10K/month Google Search ad credits + free Workspace for up to 2,000 staff. Rolling application via Goodstack. PREREQUISITES RESOLVED: registration confirmed (Reg. 00NGO/R/8931), learnimpact.org domain secured, website in progress. Sequence: website live → Goodstack submission (10-14 days) → activate ad grant. Immediate priority.

opportunities.title: Google.org Impact Challenge Africa — SOMA AI Teacher Coaching
opportunities.won_lost_notes: Competitive window — no open call currently active. FRAMING LOCKED: LearnImpact is an established NGO (NOT a startup) with QJE-published RCT evidence, 265 schools, 10+ years programme history, newly independent. Tech hook (updated July 2026): SOMA = AI predictive analytics on KiuFunza + Uwezo historical data + live democratised learning dashboard at $3.12/student/year. Strategy: complete Track 1 (Google for Nonprofits) first to establish Google relationship, then build direct connection with Google.org Africa team before next Impact Challenge opens. Watch for Africa-specific calls (typically 3-6 months advance notice). Ask range $500K-$2M realistic given SOMA evidence base.

opportunities.title: Tanzania Creator Economy Fund — Disability-Inclusive Programme Partnership
opportunities.won_lost_notes: TZS 2B fund activates July 2026. Timamu must be registered in Tanzania first. Apply: Ministry of ICT. Position: government funds infrastructure, Timamu provides disability-inclusive programme capability.
